title: Flying Ball Orb Toys 2025，Hover Ball Pro Flying Spinner Toy， UFO RGB Cool Stuff Globe Orbi Magic Boomerang Hand Controller Mini Drone for 8 9 10 11 12 boys girls Kids (Blue)
features: [Easy Control & RGB Light] The flying ball provides a unique system where different throwing angles and speeds will create a boomerang effect, so that your kids will have a unique way of playing and they will not have to constantly keep bending to pick it up and the colorful RGB light will surely keep your kid intrigued.

[Protective Cage & Lightweight] The flying ball has a cage, which is made up of high grade ABS material, which is lightweight, flexible, drop resistant and encloses propellers and also the upgraded mesh shell layers causes no harm to your children's fingers.

[USB Rechargeable] The flying ball includes 1 built in rechargeable battery and a USB charging cable. All you have to do is simply connect the ball to the USB connector for 25 to 30 minutes to full charge which gives a flying time of up to 10 minutes.

[Indoor & Outdoor Use] Whether you kids want to play it on their own or the whole family wants to play, it can be easily controlled in any environment. The smooth flight pattern and the boomerang effect is perfect for backyard, garden, park, school, or office, indoor play. Put your magic ball in your pocket and have fun anytime, anywhere.

[The Perfect Gift] This hand-controlled drone is a fun novelty present for birthdays, Christmas or a surprise for any random occasion, perfect to improve creative intelligence in your kids, teenagers, increase parent-child interaction and will also help in reducing stress for adults and elderly.
description: Product Description Magic Cool Flying Levitating Ball Brings You More Fun Our products are designed to enhance children’s extracurricular entertainment programs and develop their social skills. Whether you want your kids to enjoy screen-free playtime for solo amusement or bonding with their peers, XINHOME provides flying ball toys to get everyone engaged. USB Charging Simply connect the flying ball to the USB connector for 25 to 30 minutes to full charge which gives a flying time of up to 10 minutes. High Quality Flexible Plastic After strict tests, we finally choose polypropylene plastic to make the shell of our hover ball. It has the quality of being soft but durable, safe and strong for children’s play. Safe And Durable Design Our flying ball toy’s protective shell is soft yet very durable. You don’t have to worry that the flying toy will be damaged easily by your children. The flying ball will stop automatically when it bumps into furniture or any other object. With three dazzling colored lights, your hover ball will look like a neon shooting star when you launch it across the sky. What is XINHOME Flying Ball Made of? Smart AI Chip Inside a customized smart IC chip on the printed circuit board controls the flying ball so it works efficiently. With the activation of functions like on/off by a shake or pat motion, the LED strip will flash with a changing color. Reverse Propeller Design The unique reverse propeller design gives the balance support when the ball toy is flying toward the intended direction. Brushless Motor The flying ball’s lightweight engine offers power for the whole toy to work without weighing it down with heavy parts. How to Play with this Flying Ball? There are some tricks that take some time to practice , you will find it fun once you get the hang of it. - Press the switch to turn it on, then shake or pat the ball to let the propeller and LED light activate. It will stop flying after it bumps an object and falls to the ground. If you press the switch for a second time, you can turn off the motor. - Straight Line Boomerang: Grasp the spinning flying ball at the center with your hand, then throw it at a 15-to-30-degree angle horizontally or vertically. It will fly back to follow its original flight path after the flying ball reaches its maximum height. - Magic Levitation: Hold the running flying ball with your hand, then release it slowly and keep it balanced and centered . At the same time, move your hand and place your palm about 1-5cm beneath the flying ball. It will be suspended in the air following the movement of your palm.
